items.descriptionZh: 农历八月十五，月亮最圆的节日，家人一起赏月。
items.descriptionEn: On the 15th day of the 8th lunar month, families admire the fullest moon together.

items.descriptionZh: 圆圆的月饼像月亮，甜甜的馅儿真好吃。
items.descriptionEn: Round mooncakes look like the moon and taste sweet.

items.descriptionZh: 中秋的月亮又大又圆，挂在夜空像玉盘。
items.descriptionEn: The Mid-Autumn moon is big and round like a jade plate in the sky.

items.descriptionZh: 传说中住在月亮上的仙女，陪着一只玉兔。
items.descriptionEn: In legend, the fairy Chang'e lives on the moon with a jade rabbit.

items.descriptionZh: 月亮上捣药的小白兔，是嫦娥的好伙伴。
items.descriptionEn: The little white rabbit on the moon is Chang'e's companion.

items.descriptionZh: 中秋节全家人聚在一起，开开心心吃饭赏月。
items.descriptionEn: Families gather happily to eat and watch the moon at Mid-Autumn.

items.descriptionZh: 秋天开放的小黄花，香香的还能做桂花糕。
items.descriptionEn: Tiny fragrant yellow flowers bloom in autumn and flavor sweet cakes.

items.descriptionZh: 挂在灯笼下的小谜语，猜对了特别开心。
items.descriptionEn: Riddles hang under lanterns; guessing right is great fun.

items.descriptionZh: 晚上和家人一起抬头看又圆又亮的月亮。
items.descriptionEn: Look up at the bright full moon together with family at night.

items.descriptionZh: 中秋在秋天，天气凉爽，果实成熟了。
items.descriptionEn: Mid-Autumn comes in cool autumn when fruits ripen.
